title: QML With SoftQLib Guide
subtitle: Quantum Machine Learning with SoftQLib
description: A Quantum Machine Learning (QML) guide showing three ways to implement QML with SoftQLib: using the VQE primitive, the PyTorch integration, and the QSVM built-in app. Each section includes a brief explanation and a runnable example, aimed at users already familiar with SoftQLib and QML basics.
